metadata.title: AI5D — Strategy, Training & AI Labs
metadata.description: AI strategy, deployment, and training for leaders and organizations. Transform your organization with the AI5D method in 90 days.

hero.title: Transform your organization with the AI5D method in 90 days
hero.subtitle: Consulting, Training & AI Labs.

constat.title: Nobody takes responsibility for the complete transformation.
constat.col1_desc: They think Strategy. But when the report is delivered, nobody knows where to start.
constat.col2_desc: They build the tools. But without training those who must use them.
constat.col3_desc: They automate quickly. But when they leave, the know-how leaves with them.

resultats.stat1_desc: of time saved on repetitive tasks from the first month

temoignages.title: They deploy AI with us
temoignages.1_quote: We thought AI was only for large corporations. AI5D proved us wrong in 6 weeks. Our reports that took a full day now come out in 10 minutes.
temoignages.2_quote: What convinced me is that when Karamo left, everything kept running. My teams know how to use and maintain the tools. It's the first time a contractor truly made us autonomous.
temoignages.3_quote: In one month, three of my team members created their own automations. The Academy doesn't train users, it trains creators.

about.title: About
about.expertise: AI strategy expert, automation (n8n), organizational transformation
about.pitch_focus: I spent years seeing companies buy AI like they was buying IKEA furniture. No manual, no tools, and no one to assemble it.
about.pitch_vision: AI5D was born from this frustration. My approach is simple: I don't sell technology, I build systems that work when I'm no longer there. If your teams are not autonomous at the end of the mission, I failed.
about.quote: "The real AI ROI is not the tool. It's the team that knows how to use it."

faq.title: Questions we get asked.
faq.1_a: Yes. The first 30 days are for auditing and deploying initial automations. By day 60, your teams are trained. By day 90, everything is in production and you're autonomous.
faq.2_q: We don't have a tech team. Is that a problem?
faq.2_a: Quite the opposite. Our systems are built for business teams, not developers. And our Academy program makes them capable of creating their own solutions.
faq.3_q: Does it work for our industry?
faq.3_a: If you have repetitive processes, manual reports, or underused data — yes. Logistics, services, manufacturing, marketing: the potential is everywhere.
faq.4_a: That's the whole point. Every system is documented, every team is trained. Our goal is for you to no longer need us.
faq.5_a: It depends on the scope. We always start with a free 30-minute call to assess your situation. No rigid pricing grid, a quote tailored to your reality.

cta_final.punchline: Those who master AI will define the rules. The others will endure them.
cta_final.subtext: 30 minutes. No commitment. We evaluate your situation together.
